detectors.description:
Reentrancy in UpgradableToken.upgrade(uint256) (MossCoin.sol#341-361):
	External calls:
	- UpgradeAgent(upgradeAgent).upgradeFrom(msg.sender,_value) (MossCoin.sol#357)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Upgrade(msg.sender,upgradeAgent,_value) (MossCoin.sol#359)
